2023-24 UNLV Rebels Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 21-13 (12-6, 4th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Kevin Kruger

PS/G: 73.6 (175th of 362)

PA/G: 68.9 (84th of 362)

SRS: 8.38 (80th of 362)

SOS: 6.25 (84th of 362)

ORtg: 109.5 (111th of 362)

DRtg: 102.5 (140th of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
